nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Albo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alejandro, Alberto, Mario, Alicia, Arturo, Catalina, Cesar, Edelberto, Guadalupe, Jacobo, Javier, Joaquin.  Italian Cecilio, Marco, Romeo.  Scandinavian Per.  Jewish Irit, Tali, Yitzhak.
Spanish and Italian; Catalan (Albó): from a personal name or nickname ultimately derived from Latin albus ‘white’.
Galician: habitational name from a place called Albo in the province of Lugo (Galicia, Spain).

variants.name: Alberto
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Alberto, Carlos, Francisco, Angel, Gerardo, Jorge, Julio, Andres, Gregorio.  Portuguese Heitor.  Italian Antonio, Angelo, Carlo, Domenic, Eliseo, Enrico, Gilda, Gino, Guido, Lorenzo, Mirella, Pasquale.
Spanish, Portuguese, and Italian: from the personal name Alberto, an equivalent of Albert .

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

en.lifeSummary: Eva De Albo MONASTERIOS\De OSWALDESTERE was born in 1235, in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. She died in January 1283, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Eva De Albo MONASTERIOS\De OSWALDESTERE est née en 1235, à Whitchurch, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée en janvier 1283, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Eva De Albo MONASTERIOS\De OSWALDESTERE wurde 1235 in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie starb im Januar 1283 im Alter von 48 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Eva De Albo MONASTERIOS\De OSWALDESTERE è nata il nel 1235 nel Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel gennaio 1283, all'età di 48 anni.
